layout.title: FerroScale
layout.description: Metal weight and price calculator for EN standard and custom profiles. Accurate estimates with traceable formulas.
layout.openGraphDescription: Calculate weight and price for EN profile types with traceable formulas and references.

settings.title: Settings - FerroScale
settings.description: Adjust calculator defaults and preferences in FerroScale.

contact.title: Contact - FerroScale
contact.description: Send a report or get in touch about FerroScale.

loading.title: Loading workspace
loading.subtitle: Preparing your calculator, projects, and live results.

pwa.offlineBanner: Offline mode active. You can continue calculations with cached data.
pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of the app is available.
pwa.readyForOffline: App is ready for offline use.

page.title: Contact / Send report
page.description: Found an issue or have a question? Send us a message below.

form.title: Report a formula or data issue
form.description: Send suspected calculation issues with context. Rate-limited and protected with CAPTCHA.

api.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again later.

validation.nameRange: Name must be between 2 and 80 characters.
validation.messageRange: Message must be between 10 and 1500 characters.
